title: Sigverif.exe
html:
Sigverif.exe

File Signature Verification utility to verify digital signatures of files

Execute

Execute arbitrary programs through a trusted Microsoft-signed binary to bypass application whitelisting.

sigverif.exe

Launch sigverif.exe GUI, click 'Advanced', specify arbitrary executable path as 'log file name', then click 'View Log' to execute the binary. — MITRE: T1218 — Privileges: User
